items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ CE New Bucket Bag
Louise is crafted from calfskin suede to create a sleek, fluid bucket silhouette. A deep background highlights the exquisite, shiny gold Triomphe triumph logo, presenting a relaxed and casual temperament. The bag features a handle and a detachable shoulder strap, with very impressive capacity. Completely stress-free for daily commuting, business trips, and office work 🤎
Model: 116613
Color: Suede/Brown (with original packaging)
Dimensions: 24x25x16

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ TEEN LOLA Best Seller Recommendation❇️
CE Autumn/Winter New Teen Lola Signature Print Handbag 👜.
Another masterpiece from the Arc de Triomphe family. Teen Lola is online with TRIO MPHE snap closure. It features 1 interior compartment and 1 interior flat pocket. The long shoulder strap is detachable and adjustable. The bag presents an ultimate French elegance style. It can easily fit a phone, compact powder, lipstick, small card holder, and other daily necessities! Not only is it small, exquisite, and cute, but it can also be carried by hand, crossbody, or over the shoulder for various styles 🫶🏻
Model: 119533
Color: Burgundy (with original packaging)
Dimensions: 20x11.5x5cm

Authentic Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ When talking about the 24 Fall/Winter show, you can't help but be drawn to the glossy items 👁️ Clean, elegant lines. Minimalist design with intersecting contours. If you can only choose one piece, it must be this TERENCE. The iconic TRIOMPHE logo element, gentle and elegant. Patent calfskin, unique luster and recognizability - A petite and fun shape, can be carried as a handbag or over the shoulder❇️

1 interior flat pocket
1 adjustable leather handle
Style No.:118313
Color: Black
Size:21x5.5x11cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival🅰️🅰️
Celine 23 Early Spring Lisa Style Mini ~besace
The real thing is so beautiful, retro and stylish, looks good with any outfit! The curved bottom and flap design make it look younger. Compared to the relatively mini style, the handle design is both playful and cute, a style you'll fall in love with at first glance, carrying it for photos is full of elegance. Can be worn crossbody or shoulder, or carried by hand!
Style: Retro, stylish, cute style~
Capacity: Large phone doesn't fit, can hold keys, tissues, compact powder, 💄
Model: 10K502 Mocha Brown (Pure steel hardware)
Size: 15.5-11.5-5 (with original packaging)
